_comment: Dogfood committed settings (v0.44.0 / T-12). Hooks moved OUT of this committed file so the published plugin distributes NO leakable hooks; only permissions remain here.
_hooks_moved: Dogfood hooks (Stop/PreToolUse/UserPromptSubmit/SessionStart) live in .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored, same load precedence for local dev) so the published plugin ships no leakable hooks. They use the resilient form harness-init ships. See docs/features/_archived/resilient-hooks/ (T-12, v0.44.0).
